model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the 'Logout' button.
Looking at the image, the 'Logout' button is located at the bottom of the menu list inside the center box.
The coordinates for 'Logout' are approximately x=505, y=625.
